description: Weigh a question before a panel: several jurors deliberate, one judge rules.
Staff `juror` with 3-12 models (each gives an independent verdict with reasoning); a single `judge` tallies the panel and delivers the binding decision.

roles.description: Give your own independent verdict with a short reason. Do not defer to the others.
Weigh the jurors' verdicts, resolve disagreement, and deliver the binding decision.
